bead.title: refactor(svelte): gitignore $houdini/, run houdini:generate in bun postinstall + vite plugin
bead.description:
Opus Stage 3 batch review (2026-04-15): $houdini/ generated artifacts are committed to git (72 files in Stage 3.4 + hand-edits in Stage 3.8 + f5d6fd5 'refresh houdini artifacts' post-fix). The f5d6fd5 commit is proof of the drift problem — artifacts diverged from schema, required manual refresh.

Fix: add $houdini/ to frontend/.gitignore; run houdini:generate via bun postinstall hook; also run via the vite plugin (houdiniPreprocess) so dev mode regenerates automatically on schema change. Remove all tracked $houdini/ files in this bead's commit.
bead.acceptance: (1) frontend/.gitignore includes $houdini/. (2) package.json has 'postinstall': 'houdini generate'. (3) $houdini/ files removed from git. (4) Fresh 'bun install && bun run check' works without any manual generate step. (5) vite dev server auto-regenerates on GraphQL file change.
